trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Mario - Let Me Love You (Lyrics)
trending_videos.description:
Stream: N/A

Check out our Playlist:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1oJZ98sB3FbQAbrZkEbdtQ?si=_xvuL7hdQlu_oQySAWsv2A

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Mmmm, ah
Mmmm, yeah
Mmmm
Yeah, yeah, yeah
Mmmm, ah
Mmmm, yeah
Mmmm
Yeah, yeah

[Verse 1]
Baby, I just don't get it, do you enjoy being hurt?
I know you smelled the perfume, the make-up on his shirt
You don't believe his stories, you know that they're all lies
Bad as you are, you stick around and I just don't know why

[Pre-Chorus]
If I was ya' man, baby, you'd...
Never worry 'bout what I do
I'd be coming home, back to you, every night, doing you right
You're the type of woman who deserves good things
Fistful of diamonds, a hand full of rings
Baby, you're a star, I just wanna show you you are

[Chorus]
You should let me love you
Let me be the one to
Give you everything you want and need
Baby, good love and protection
Make me your selection
Show you the way love's supposed to be
Baby, you should let me love you, love you, love you
Love you
Yeah, listen
tags: You should let me love you
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need

superhero_themed_videos.observations: Three out of the ten videos are related to Spider-Man, indicating a strong interest in superhero content. This includes trailers and breakdowns, suggesting both high anticipation for new releases and a demand for in-depth analysis of content.
superhero_themed_videos.opportunities: Producing more content related to upcoming superhero films or series, including detailed analyses and Easter egg hunts, could capture a dedicated audience.

gaming_content.observations: Two videos are gaming-related, one being the reveal of a major title (GTA VI) and another being related to gaming culture.
gaming_content.opportunities: Focusing on major game releases and related content such as gameplay analysis or fan theories could engage the gaming community effectively.

music_and_lyrics_videos.observations: Music-related content, including official videos and lyric videos, continue to be popular.
music_and_lyrics_videos.opportunities: Creating lyric videos or music video breakdowns for trending songs can attract viewers interested in music.

entertainment_series_teasers.observations: The presence of an official teaser for a popular series like Outer Banks indicates a steady interest in streaming content.
entertainment_series_teasers.opportunities: Developing content around popular series, such as reaction videos or detailed episode reviews, could draw attention from fans.

large_studio_channels.observations: Half of the top videos are from large, established studios, showing their ability to consistently create buzzworthy content.
large_studio_channels.strategies: Leveraging collaborations with these studios or creating supplementary content based on their releases can enhance visibility.

independent_creators.observations: Independent creators are successfully capturing niche interests, particularly in content analysis and unique entertainment formats.
independent_creators.strategies: Supporting independent creators through cross-promotion or platform features can help in diversifying content offerings.

cross-category_content.description: Combining elements from different trending categories, such as a gaming-themed music video or a superhero-themed gaming analysis, could attract diverse audiences.

emerging_platform_features.description: Exploring new YouTube features like Shorts for quick content snippets or live streaming for real-time engagement could enhance reach.

localization_of_content.description: Creating localized content versions, especially for music and gaming, can tap into non-English-speaking markets and increase global engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
